title: Marari Beach
tagline: Marari Beach — beach town of Kerala

overview.short: Marari Beach is a beach at Mararikulam village in Alappuzha District of Kerala, India, 11 km from Alappuzha (Alleppey) town.
overview.description: Marari Beach is a beach at Mararikulam village in Alappuzha District of Kerala, India, 11 km from Alappuzha (Alleppey) town.

topPlaces.name: Mararikulam
topPlaces.description: Mararikulam is a village in India, in the district of Alappuzha, Kerala state. Previously, it was a constituency in the Kerala Legislative Assembly, represented by legislators including T. M. Thomas Isaac, V. S. Achuthanandan, Vijayamma.

topPlaces.name: Mararikulam North
topPlaces.description: Mararikulam North is a Gram Panchayat in Alapuzha, Kerala, India. Located on the coast of Arabian Sea, towards the northern end of south Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Mararikkulam North
topPlaces.description: Mararikkulam North is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kanichukulangara Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Kanichukulangara Temple (referred to as Kanichukulangara Bhagwathy Temple) is a famous temple of the Hindu mother goddess Bhagawathi. The temple is located near Cherthala in Alappuzha district of Kerala in India.

topPlaces.name: Kattoor, Alappuzha
topPlaces.description: Kattoor is a coastal village in Aryad Block Alappuzha district, Kerala, India. It is under Mararikulam south panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Kanjikuzhi (Alappuzha)
topPlaces.description: Kanjikuzhi is a census town and Panchayat in Alappuzha district in the state of Kerala, India. Kanjikuzhi is located 16 km (9.9 mi) north of the district headquarters Alappuzha and 7 km (4.3 mi) south of Cherthala.

topPlaces.name: Mararikulam South
topPlaces.description: Mararikulam South is a panchayat and part of Mararikulam. It is in Alappuzha district, India.

topPlaces.name: International Coir Museum
topPlaces.description: International Coir Museum is a museum located in Kerala state of India. The museum is located in Kalavoor in Alappuzha district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Marari Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Marari Beach is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Marari Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Marari Beach?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Marari Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Marari Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Marari Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Marari Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mararikulam, Mararikulam North, Mararikkulam North, Kanichukulangara Devi Temple, Kattoor, Alappuzha.
